TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Olaf Scholz ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 6, Olaf Scholz, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1958) mrhuw Germany ta' misuw hya' ga Olaf Scholz, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Olaf Scholz minkahul sa Osnabrück, Lower Saxony na Germany. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1958 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: ola* s~ɕʦ~ʨħolz rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ola* s~ɕʦ~ʨħolz, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ɣermanj taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ola* s~ɕʦ~ʨħolz, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral ola* s~ɕʦ~ʨħolz minkaħul s~ɕa os~ɕnaβr*ʦ~ʨk, lower s~ɕaxonj na ɣermanj. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
S.FORM: Olaf Scholz ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 6, Olaf Scholz, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1958) mrhuw Germany ta' misuw hya' ga Olaf Scholz, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Olaf Scholz minkahul sa Osnabrück, Lower Saxony na Germany. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1958 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: ola* s~ɕʦ~ʨħolz rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ola* s~ɕʦ~ʨħolz, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ɣermanj taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ola* s~ɕʦ~ʨħolz, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral ola* s~ɕʦ~ʨħolz minkaħul s~ɕa os~ɕnaβr*ʦ~ʨk, lower s~ɕaxonj na ɣermanj. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
